installCommand: rm -rf AutoMatch-Back AutoMatch-Front && git clone https://github.com/AugustoSodre/AutoMatch-Back.git AutoMatch-Back && git clone https://github.com/AugustoSodre/AutoMatch-Front.git AutoMatch-Front && cd AutoMatch-Back && npm ci && cd ../AutoMatch-Front && npm ci
buildCommand: node scripts/patch-backend.mjs && cd AutoMatch-Back && npm run build && cd ../AutoMatch-Front && npm run build -- --output-path=../dist --base-href=/
